chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 1661 of 2012 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on MA No 7680/2012 2. For katcha Peshi 19.02.2018. Mr. Mumtaz Sachal Awan Advocate for the petitioner -=-=- Learned counsel for petitioner under the instructions of petitioner does not press this constitutional petition, which is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed/steno
